themes.title: Search Performance Metrics
themes.description: Establishing metrics to evaluate and improve search performance.

themes.title: User Engagement and Feedback
themes.description: Collecting user feedback to enhance search results and relevance.

themes.title: Search Algorithm Optimization
themes.description: Testing and optimizing search algorithms based on user data.

milestones.name: MVP Completion
milestones.description: Complete the MVP for the SearchBoost Query Engine.
milestones.success_criteria: MVP is deployed with no critical issues and all blocking items resolved.

milestones.name: V1 Metrics Implementation
milestones.description: Implement key metrics for search performance.
milestones.success_criteria: All metrics are established and validated with user feedback.

milestones.name: V2 Algorithm Testing
milestones.description: Conduct A/B testing for search algorithm changes.
milestones.success_criteria: A/B testing results are analyzed and actionable insights are generated.

sequencing.reason: V1 metrics implementation requires the completion of the MVP.
V2 algorithm testing depends on the successful implementation of V1 metrics.

mvp.goal: Establish a functional MVP to validate core features.

v1.goal: Implement and validate key metrics for search performance.

v2.goal: Optimize search algorithms based on user feedback and testing.
